final:
module shift_register (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input serial_in,
    output reg [3:0] shift_reg
);

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            shift_reg <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            shift_reg <= {shift_reg[2:0], serial_in};
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (reset) begin
        shift_reg <= 4'b1111;
      end else if (serial_in) begin
        shift_reg <= 4'b0000;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
